style_block: Style: clean modern product illustration for a fishing app icon, slightly clip-art-like with smooth shapes and crisp edges, light cel shading, not photorealistic, not childish cartoon. No text, no watermark, no logo, no background scenery — fully transparent background only.
composition_suffix: Composition: one isolated object centered on a square canvas with generous padding. Show accurate real-world lure or fly anatomy: hook(s), line tie, body, blades or fibers where applicable. Neutral studio lighting feel without casting a ground shadow onto a surface.

subjects.weightless_stick_worm: Senko-style straight soft plastic stick worm rigged Texas style with bullet weight at nose and offset wide-gap hook buried in the worm, worm horizontal.
subjects.carolina_rigged_stick_worm: Stick worm on a Carolina rig: glass bead, brass bullet weight, swivel, leader to offset hook with straight worm.
subjects.shaky_head_worm: Finesse straight-tail worm on a mushroom or ball shaky jig head, small stand-up head, hook point exposed.
subjects.drop_shot_worm: Small straight-tail or roboworm-style soft plastic nose-hooked on a drop shot rig with teardrop weight below on thin wire leader.
subjects.drop_shot_minnow: Soft plastic minnow profile bait nose-hooked on drop shot with small cylindrical or teardrop weight.
subjects.ned_rig: Short mushroom jig head with small buoyant stick bait (NED style), compact finesse package.
subjects.tube_jig: Classic hollow tube skirt on a ball or tube jig head with internal jig eye visible at front.
subjects.texas_rigged_soft_plastic_craw: Compact craw or creature bait Texas rigged with pegged bullet weight and offset hook, craw claws visible.
subjects.football_jig: Football-shaped lead jig with fiber weedguard and skirt, heavy flipping hook, brush guard.
subjects.compact_flipping_jig: Compact heavy-cover flipping jig with dense skirt, stout hook, weedguard.
subjects.finesse_jig: Small ball or finesse jig head with sparse skirt and light wire or medium wire finesse hook.
subjects.swim_jig: Swim jig with hydrodynamic head, horizontal line tie, swimming skirt, keel-weighted look.
subjects.hair_jig: Bucktail or synthetic hair jig with sparse hair wing and jig head, minnow profile.
subjects.inline_spinner: Single-blade inline spinner (Mepps-style): wire shaft, clevis-mounted French or Colorado blade ahead of a dressed treble or single hook.
subjects.spinnerbait: Classic safety-pin spinnerbait with Colorado or tandem blades, wire arm, silicone skirt, lead head with single hook.
subjects.bladed_jig: Chatterbait-style bladed swim jig: hex blade connected to jig head, silicone skirt, offset line tie.
subjects.paddle_tail_swimbait: Soft plastic paddle-tail swimbait on a jig head or weighted hook, horizontal swimming posture.
subjects.soft_jerkbait: Soft fluke or jerkbait-style soft plastic with split tail, belly weighted or jig hook.
subjects.suspending_jerkbait: Hard minnow jerkbait with clear lip, realistic baitfish profile, two or three trebles, suspending neutral buoyancy look.
subjects.squarebill_crankbait: Shallow crankbait with square diving bill, stubby body, treble hooks.
subjects.flat_sided_crankbait: Flat-sided balsa-style crankbait with small bill and slender profile.
subjects.medium_diving_crankbait: Medium bill round-body crankbait, moderate lip angle.
subjects.deep_diving_crankbait: Deep diver crankbait with long angled bill and streamlined body.
subjects.lipless_crankbait: Lipless rattling crankbait (vibe): no bill, tall thin profile, line tie on nose, rattles implied.
subjects.blade_bait: Metal blade bait with front and rear trebles, weighted stamping, vibration lure profile.
subjects.casting_spoon: Curved metal casting spoon with single treble or single hook at narrow end.
subjects.walking_topwater: Stickbait walking lure: slender cigar topwater, trebles belly and tail, no props.
subjects.popping_topwater: Cup-faced popper topwater with concave mouth, chugger profile.
subjects.buzzbait: Buzzbait with single large prop blade on wire arm over skirted jig head.
subjects.prop_bait: Torpedo-style double-prop topwater with propellers at nose and tail.
subjects.hollow_body_frog: Hollow-body weedless frog with upturned double hooks tucked along sides, skirted legs.
subjects.large_profile_pike_swimbait: Large multi-jointed or big paddle-tail swimbait for pike/musky, heavy hook, long profile.
subjects.pike_jerkbait: Long slender hard jerkbait for esox: big lip or glide style, oversized hooks.
subjects.clouser_minnow: Clouser Minnow fly: dumbbell eyes on top of shank, bucktail wing, baitfish profile, hook point down.
subjects.deceiver: Lefty's Deceiver-style streamer: stacked bucktail feathers, long taper, eye at head.
subjects.bucktail_baitfish_streamer: Sparse bucktail baitfish streamer with flowing tail, conical head.
subjects.slim_minnow_streamer: Slim epoxy or bucktail minnow streamer, narrow baitfish silhouette.
subjects.articulated_baitfish_streamer: Two-section articulated streamer with front and rear hook shanks, baitfish colors.
subjects.articulated_dungeon_streamer: Articulated dungeon-style big streamer: stacked deer hair or bulky head, rubber legs, predator look.
subjects.game_changer: Blane Chico-style Game Changer articulated fly with multiple fish-scale segments along body.
subjects.woolly_bugger: Classic Woolly Bugger: marabou tail, chenille body, palmered hackle, woolly worm profile.
subjects.rabbit_strip_leech: Zonker-style leech with wide rabbit strip wing, bead or cone optional at head.
subjects.balanced_leech: Balanced leech fly with pin or balanced shank extending below hook, horizontal jigging posture in water.
subjects.zonker_streamer: Zonker stripwing streamer with rabbit strip over back, minnow shape.
subjects.sculpin_streamer: Mottled sculpin imitation streamer: wide pectoral-wing materials, flat head.
subjects.sculpzilla: Large modern sculpin streamer: bulky head, stacked fibers, articulated or long shank.
subjects.muddler_sculpin: Muddler Minnow style: spun deer hair head, turkey or squirrel wing, sculpin/minnow hybrid.
subjects.crawfish_streamer: Crayfish fly with claws, antennae, segmented body, dumbbell or lead eyes.
subjects.conehead_streamer: Conehead weighted tube or streamer with metal cone at front, swimming jig action.
subjects.pike_bunny_streamer: Large pike bunny streamer: long rabbit strip, big hook, flashy lateral line.
subjects.large_articulated_pike_streamer: Very large articulated pike fly with multiple segments, big profile, predator streamer.
subjects.popper_fly: Foam or deer-hair popper fly with cupped face for surface pop, weedguard optional.
subjects.frog_fly: Deer-hair or foam frog pattern with splayed legs, wide body, surface frog silhouette.
subjects.mouse_fly: Mouse pattern surface fly: deer hair or foam rodent body, tail, ears, single stout hook.
